title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the photographs and answer the questions.

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say how important cooperation is in these situations and what might happen if the people don't work together.

images.label: A
images.description: A team of medical professionals, including surgeons and nurses, performing a complex operation in a theater.

images.label: B
images.description: Two people together assembling a large tent on a windy day at a campsite.

images.label: C
images.description: A group of office colleagues brainstorming and writing ideas on a large white board during a meeting.

followUp.question: In which situation is communication most critical? (Why?)

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say why people might choose to shop in these places and what the atmosphere might be like.

images.label: D
images.description: A traditional outdoor food market with colorful stalls selling fresh fruits and vegetables.

images.label: E
images.description: A high-end, luxury fashion boutique with minimalist decor and very few customers.

images.label: F
images.description: A crowded, modern supermarket with self-service checkouts and aisles of packaged goods.

followUp.question: Which of these shopping experiences do you find most appealing? (Why?)
